wi_combined_pfoa_pfos.label: Wisconsin enforceable standard, PFOA + PFOS combined (NR 809, Aug 2022)

federal_mcl_pfoa.label: Federal MCL, PFOA (April 2024 rule; compliance 2029, proposed extension to 2031)

federal_mcl_pfos.label: Federal MCL, PFOS (April 2024 rule; compliance 2029, proposed extension to 2031)

federal_hazard_index.label: Federal Hazard Index MCL (proposed for rescission, May 2026)

nitrate.label: Federal & Wisconsin MCL, nitrate as N

arsenic.label: Federal MCL, arsenic (0.010 mg/L = 10 µg/L, 2001 rule)

lead.label: Federal action level at the 90th percentile of tap samples (drops to 10 µg/L under the 2024 LCRI, compliance 2027) — not a single-sample standard

copper.label: Federal action level at the 90th percentile of tap samples — not a single-sample standard

data_notes.dws: DNR DWS portal data, current as of ~10 p.m. the prior day.
data_notes.sdwis: EPA SDWIS federal data refreshes quarterly; violations can lag DNR records.
data_notes.non_detects: Non-detect results carry value null; qualifier and LOD are preserved.
